pageDescription: Request a tattoo consultation with one of our talented artists at United Tattoo in Fountain, CO.

hero.title: Request a Consult
hero.description: Tell us about your tattoo idea, preferred artist, placement, and timing. We will review the request and follow up with next steps.

artist.label: 01 // Artist
artist.heading: Who are you looking to work with?
artist.hint: Select 'No preference' if you'd like us to recommend an artist based on your style.
artist.manualAvailabilityPlaceholder: e.g. Weekends in March, Tuesdays after 4pm
artist.manualAvailabilityLink: Can't find a suitable time? Enter manually

references.label: 04 // Visuals
references.heading: Reference Images
references.description: Upload up to 5 images to help us understand your vision. These can be photos of other tattoos, artwork, or placement photos.
references.uploadHint: or click to browse · Max 5 images · 10MB each

agreements.ageText: I confirm I am 18+ years old.
agreements.newsletterText: Stay informed about promotions, events, and tattoo inspiration from United Tattoo.

success.label: Request Confirmed
success.title: Thank You
success.message: Your booking request has been received. We'll review your details and respond within 24-48 hours.
success.timing: Expect a response via your preferred contact method.
nextSteps: Our reception desk reviews your request and reference images
Your selected artist reviews the details and reaches out to discuss your vision
We propose dates/times and confirm any deposit details
